---
title: " Morgane Henry"
image: media/headshot.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 250px
  links:
    - text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Morgane-Henry-2?ev=hdr_xprf
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:morgane.henry2@mail.mcgill.ca
---

::: {style="font-size: 1.2em;"}
I am a PhD candidate in quantitative ecology in the [Leung Lab](https://leung-lab.github.io/leunglab/) at McGill University. My research focuses mainly on outbreaks of forest insects and their population dynamics. In particular, I'm interested in how low-density populations transition into large-scale outbreaks. I combine statistical modelling, long-term population data, and ecological theory to understand the dynamics underlying these processes. 


:::
